title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Medical Officer to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies:
Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals Digital Technologies!
